title: Occupational Multiplicity
description: Detects when work roles are recognized as one facet of a larger skill-web, affirming resilience, adaptability, and the coexistence of multiple domains of expertise.
indicators: Occupation contextualized as part of broader capabilities
Recognition of skills gained through lived work experience
Stories that honor multiple roles in parallel
Respect for practical and intellectual domains equally
